studio.emptyAndMalformedPolicy: visible warning or empty state; no browser mutation, command execution, repair, persistence, or auto-apply

knownGaps: Fixture evidence is expected data, not a live browser run artifact.
GL10.13.3 does not add new browser commands, write APIs, runtime script execution, production editor claims, or hosted/cloud behavior.
Future issues may wire richer dashboard/Studio rendering after preserving this read-only contract.

cleanupPolicy.manualCleanup: Delete ignored generated roots after local review if they are created; never commit them unless a later issue scopes tiny fixtures explicitly.

boundary: Dashboard and Studio compatibility is read-only inspection of structured behavior evidence; no arbitrary script execution, eval, dynamic import, plugin loader, command bridge, local server bridge, browser trusted writes, source mutation, auto-apply, auto-merge, self-approval, hosted/cloud behavior, production-stable scripting API, production editor, native export, or Godot replacement claim.
